summary: SPK RC 37 sua worker SQLite khong con goi pg_notify nham, tranh proxy bi treo o trang thai running/cho.
changes: Resolver event bus gio ep moi runtime SQLite/SPK ve local-only, ke ca khi env cu con sot EVENT_BUS_DRIVER=pg.
Worker SQLite khong con roi vao loi 'no such function: pg_notify' khi bat dau transcode, nen job se tiep tuc chay thay vi ket running vo thoi han.
Bo sung test khoa truong hop SPK native dung SQLite nhung con mang config event bus Postgres tu runtime cu.
